summary: Iteration 138: Cake Orders Module - All 25 backend tests passed. Tested 12 new cake-orders endpoints (config/status, create order, list, get by order_number, pos/outbound, pos/outbound/{id}/mark-delivered, email/outbox, preview/sample). Verified unique order number format CK-{INITIALS}-{YYMMDD}-{3char-checksum}, email queuing when RESEND_API_KEY not configured, POS outbound queue, and graceful Stripe degradation with placeholder key. Regression tests for production-schedules (3 endpoints) and cake-assets (7 endpoints) all passed.

verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_config_status: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/config/status returns resend_configured=false, stripe_configured=true, sender_email, brand_name='LUCCCA Pastry'
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_create_basic: PASS - POST /api/cake-orders/ creates order with format CK-{INITIALS}-{YYMMDD}-{3char-checksum}
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_initials_from_name: PASS - Initials derived from customer name (John Morrison -> JM)
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_uniqueness: PASS - Same customer/date generates DIFFERENT order numbers via checksum salt
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_single_name_initials: PASS - Single name 'Madonna' produces MX initials
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_email_queued: PASS - email_status='queued' when RESEND_API_KEY not configured, HTML written to email_outbox
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_stripe_graceful: PASS - create_deposit_link:true with placeholder key returns deposit_link=null (no crash)
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_no_email_without_client_emai: PASS - No client email keeps email_status='pending'
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_pos_outbound_pending: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/pos/outbound?status=pending returns queued items with status='pending'
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_email_outbox: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/email/outbox?status=queued returns queued emails with resend_configured flag
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_list_sorted_desc: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/ returns orders sorted by created_at desc, no _id leak
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_get_by_number: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/{order_number} returns specific order, no _id leak
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_preview_sample: PASS - GET /api/cake-orders/preview/sample returns sample order + HTML (>1000 chars) without persisting
verified_features.CAKE_ORDERS_no_id_leak: PASS - _id is NEVER included in any cake-orders response
verified_features.REGRESSION_production_schedules_list: PASS - GET /api/production-schedules/ still works, no _id leak

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed orders for testing (TEST_Basic Wedding Cake, TEST_Uniqueness Test Cake, TEST_Single Name Cake, TEST_Deposit Link Cake, TEST_No Email Cake, TEST_No Client Email Cake, TEST_Get Order Test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cake Orders module fully functional with 12 endpoints. Order number format: CK-{INITIALS}-{YYMMDD}-{3char-checksum} where initials from customer name (single name gets X suffix), YYMMDD from pickup_date, checksum from safe alphabet (no 0/O/1/I). RESEND_API_KEY not configured - emails queue to email_outbox collection. STRIPE_API_KEY is placeholder 'sk_test_emergent' - deposit link creation fails gracefully (returns null). POS outbound queue in pos_outbound collection. All responses exclude _id. Production-schedules and cake-assets endpoints still working.
